readRegistry.description: Read-only registry access returning a frozen copy (renamed from loadRegistry)

withRegistryUpdate.description: Mutation callback pattern for registry writes (renamed from registryUpdate)

commandHandlers.description: Split command files where path resolution and registry naming changes are applied

consistentPathResolution.description: All file path operations must use path.resolve() -- no path.join() with potentially relative cwd

noCommentDetection.description: handleBuildAgents() must use only SKIP_GENERATION list -- no comment-marker-based agent detection

noDeprecatedSkills.description: skills/ directory must contain only active skills -- no redirect-only deprecated skills
